goal: Safely restore the community module entry and modal integration in the current app shell while preserving all current local code and avoiding destructive repository operations.
constraints: Do not reset, checkout, or delete unrelated local changes.
Treat the current workspace snapshot as protected and restore only the missing community integration points.
Prefer minimal scoped edits in App.tsx, MainMenu.tsx, and the existing community modal/hook wiring.
Do not rewrite the community data layer unless required for the restored entry flow to work.
deliverables: Wrap the app with the existing CommunityProvider so the community module has a shared state root.
Restore a MainMenu entry that opens the existing CommunityModal without disturbing other menu flows.
Ensure the community modal can open home and jump to composer from its header action.
Document the restore scope and preservation approach in a short audit note.
